summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 598

core_modules.description: Primary public API aggregator for PlantCV image-processing workflows; best import surface for MCP tool wrapping with minimal code intrusion.
Central thresholding operations used across segmentation pipelines; stable functional units for parameterized MCP tools.
ROI construction and selection primitives; useful for composable MCP tool operations.
Core trait extraction routines producing structured measurements through PlantCV outputs.
Parallel workflow CLI entry module for batch execution and job orchestration.
Machine-learning utility CLI entry module (training/classification helpers).
Utility CLI entry module for conversion/support tooling.

cli_commands.name: plantcv.parallel.cli:main
cli_commands.description: Runs/configures parallel processing workflows (inspect config, build jobs, run multiprocess, process results).

cli_commands.name: plantcv.learn.cli:main
cli_commands.description: ML-related commands for training/inference helpers (e.g., naive Bayes / k-means tooling).

cli_commands.name: plantcv.utils.cli:main
cli_commands.description: General utility command group (format conversion and helper scripts).
